The '''IPV-1''' was a type of vessel used by [[planetary defense forces]] during the [[Republic Era]]. One IPV-1 was captured by the [[Vile]] and modified in [[the Slice]], however, it was captured by [[Depa Billaba|Hotwire]] and several enforcers and members of the [[Riftwalkers]] gang. The IPV-1 was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="TLF" />
{{Ship-stub}}
